data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding preference learning affecting box contents.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that preference learning affects box contents. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for preference learning, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this specific feature is covered or functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence confirming that preference learning is affecting box contents.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
